pubspec.yaml.changes: Added sqflite: ^2.3.0 and drift: ^2.14.0 to dependencies, plus sqlite3: ^2.4.0 and drift_dev: ^2.14.0 to dev_dependencies
pubspec.yaml.purpose: Establishing local SQLite database foundation with type-safe queries using Drift ORM

build-progress.txt.changes: New file created tracking implementation progress
build-progress.txt.status_display: Shows 1/52 subtasks completed, organized by 10 phases

implementation_plan.json.scope: 52 subtasks across 10 phases covering offline-first architecture

patterns_discovered.architecture: Offline-first pattern with local SQLite persistence using Drift ORM
patterns_discovered.state_management: Riverpod-based integration for connectivity and sync state
patterns_discovered.database_approach: Type-safe queries through Drift ORM with SQLite backend
patterns_discovered.modular_structure: Separate offline module with clean architecture layers (domain/data/presentation)
patterns_discovered.dependency_injection: Modular DI approach for offline services and database
patterns_discovered.progress_tracking: Comprehensive build progress tracking with human-readable format

gotchas_discovered.dev_dependencies: sqlite3 and drift_dev must be added to dev_dependencies section
gotchas_discovered.project_structure: Establishing clear boundary between offline module and existing code
gotchas_discovered.migration_concerns: Database versioning system needs careful planning for future migrations
gotchas_discovered.sync_complexity: Conflict resolution requires sophisticated handling of concurrent edits

approach_outcome.implementation_success: Successfully completed subtask 1.1 - dependencies added properly
approach_outcome.progress_tracking: Comprehensive tracking system established with build-progress.txt and implementation_plan.json
approach_outcome.architecture_readiness: Foundation laid for 52 subtasks across 10 phases with clear acceptance criteria
approach_outcome.dependency_management: Proper separation between runtime dependencies (sqflite, drift) and development dependencies (sqlite3, drift_dev)

next_steps: Complete Phase 1 by adding connectivity and path provider dependencies
Begin Phase 2 database schema design with entity modeling
Implement database service with lazy initialization and error handling
Create DAOs for common database operations with transaction support
best_practices: Keep version constraints aligned with Dart/Flutter ecosystem compatibility
Implement comprehensive error handling for database initialization
Use migration strategy for database schema changes
Implement proper logging for sync operations
testing_considerations: Add unit tests for database operations
Validate offline-first behavior with network simulation
